description: CompositionBlack trousers made of a cotton blends fabric, has a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back with buttoned closures, belt loops at waist, appliqué d brand patch above the right pocket with a button and zipper closure  and snipped edges at the hemFittingMid- rise Straight legWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsDesigned to be worn as casual wear with t-shirts, jackets and accessories, these trousers from basics are created from a cotton blended fabric to offer a flawless casual silhouette and absolute comfort.Model statisticsProduct is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
